versions.version_description: A folk-oriented version of Material Girl in G with an alternate melody and inclusion of the intro and post-chorus synth riff.
Some repeated sections have been cut out, but the chords are more detailed and are complete.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Girls Just Want To Have Fun

content:
[Intro]

[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch] (repeat several times)


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Some boys kiss me, some boys hug me[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                [ch]G[/ch]
I think they're O.K.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
If they don't give me proper credit[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]
I just walk away[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
They can beg and they can plead[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
But they can't see the light, that's right[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Cause the boy with the cold hard cash[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
Is always Mister Right, 'cause we are[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]Em[/ch]
Living in a material world[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Only boys who save their pennies[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
